# M1 Workflow - Foundation

## Owner
- Platform Bootstrap Agent

## Supporting
- Data Modeling Agent
- Metrics & Observability Agent
- QA & Reliability Agent

## Must Deliver
- 모노레포 골격/Compose
- core schema migration
- auth + 기본 UI shell
- CI baseline

## Exit Gate
- 로컬 스택 기동
- health/version/docs 동작
- migration 성공
